posts.content:
Real-world telemetry data and Internet of Things collide with scientific machine learning #sciml? Devices which can learn how to adapt to reality and continually improve their efficiency. #UDEs with #Dyad => better thermal efficiency.

See : arxiv.org/abs/2603.15943

#julialang #AI4Science

interestSummary: Chris Rackauckas is currently focused on the intersection of real-world telemetry data and Internet of Things (IoT) with scientific machine learning, specifically exploring how devices can learn to adapt and improve efficiency through techniques like universal differential equations (UDEs).
